name: Roasted Potatoes with Tomatoes and Rosemary
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Cook the potatoes in their skins until they are done but still firm.
3. Peel the potatoes and slice them crosswise into half-inch thick pieces.
4. Oil a large shallow baking dish.
5. Alternate layers of potatoes and tomatoes in rows.
6. Drizzle lightly with olive oil, sprinkle rosemary, chives, salt, and pepper.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the potatoes start to turn golden crisp around the edges.
